sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_col(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"
				SELECT action_id
				FROM {$table_name}
				WHERE last_attempt_gmt IS NOT NULL
				  AND UNIX_TIMESTAMP(last_attempt_gmt) < %d
				",
				$threshold
			)
		)
$wpdb->get_results( "SELECT comment_approved, COUNT( * ) AS num_comments FROM {$wpdb->comments} WHERE comment_type NOT IN('order_note','action_log') GROUP BY comment_approved", ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_var(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT {$column_name} FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE ID=%d AND post_type=%s", // phpcs:ignore
				$action_id,
				self::POST_TYPE
			)
		)

$wpdb->get_var( // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.DirectQuery, WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.NoCaching
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT ID FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE post_type = %s AND CHAR_LENGTH(post_content) > %d LIMIT 1",
					$maximum_args_length,
					self::POST_TYPE
				)
			)

sinks.expression: wp_send_json_error( [ 'message' => 'The pointer id must be provided' ] )

wp_remote_request( self::API_URL . '/get_token', [
			'method' => 'POST',
			'body' => [
				'app' => 'library',
				'grant_type' => 'authorization_code',
				'client_id' => Data::get_client_id(),
				'code' => isset( $_GET['code'] ) ? sanitize_text_field( wp_unslash( $_GET['code'] ) ) : null,
			],
		] )

wp_remote_request(
				self::API_URL . '/library/get_client_id',
				[
					'method' => 'POST',
					'body' => [
						'local_id' => get_current_user_id(),
						'site_key' => Data::get_site_key(),
						'app' => 'library',
						'home_url' => trailingslashit( home_url() ),
						'source' => 'image-optimizer',
					],
				]
			)

wp_remote_request( self::API_URL . '/disconnect', [
				'method' => 'POST',
				'body' => [
					'app' => 'library',
					'home_url' => trailingslashit( home_url() ),
					'client_id' => Data::get_client_id(),
					'access_token' => Data::get_access_token(),
				],
			] )

$wpdb->get_col(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"
				SELECT action_id
				FROM {$table_name}
				WHERE last_attempt_gmt IS NOT NULL
				  AND UNIX_TIMESTAMP(last_attempt_gmt) < %d
				",
				$threshold
			)
		)

printf(
					'<option value="%s" %s>%s</option>',
					esc_attr( $value ),
					selected( $value, $current_value, false ),
					esc_html( $title )
				)
fwrite(STDERR, 'Composer detected issues in your platform:' . PHP_EOL.PHP_EOL . implode(PHP_EOL, $issues) . PHP_EOL.PHP_EOL)

wp_die( 'Invalid state

' . esc_html__( '« Back' ) . '

' )

printf( '%1$s %2$s, Oldest: %3$s, Newest: %4$s%3$s%4$s', esc_html( $status_labels[ $status ] ), esc_html( number_format_i18n( $count ) ), esc_html( $oldest_and_newest[ $status ]['oldest'] ), esc_html( $oldest_and_newest[ $status ]['newest'] ) )
$wpdb->get_results( "SELECT comment_approved, COUNT( * ) AS num_comments FROM {$wpdb->comments} WHERE comment_type NOT IN('order_note','action_log') GROUP BY comment_approved", ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->query(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"UPDATE {$wpdb->posts} SET post_password = '' WHERE ID = %d AND post_type = %s",
				$action_id,
				self::POST_TYPE
			)
		)

$wpdb->get_var(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT {$column_name} FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE ID=%d AND post_type=%s", // phpcs:ignore
				$action_id,
				self::POST_TYPE
			)
		)

$wpdb->query(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"UPDATE {$wpdb->posts} SET menu_order = menu_order+1, post_status=%s, post_modified_gmt = %s, post_modified = %s WHERE ID = %d AND post_type = %s",
				self::STATUS_RUNNING,
				current_time( 'mysql', true ),
				current_time( 'mysql' ),
				$action_id,
				self::POST_TYPE
			)
		)

$wpdb->get_var( // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.DirectQuery, WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.NoCaching
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT ID FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE post_type = %s AND CHAR_LENGTH(post_content) > %d LIMIT 1",
					$maximum_args_length,
					self::POST_TYPE
				)
			)

printf( '

%s

', esc_html__( 'Action Scheduler migration in progress. The list of scheduled actions may be incomplete.', 'action-scheduler' ) )

sanitizers.expression: esc_html( "Hook $hook is not a part of Async_Operation_Hook values" )
esc_html( "Queue $queue is not a part of Async_Operation_Queue values" )
esc_html( "Hook $hook is not a part of Async_Operation_Hook values" )
esc_html( "Queue $queue is not a part of Async_Operation_Queue values" )
esc_html( "Hook $hook is not a part of Async_Operation_Hook values" )
esc_html( "Hook $hook is not a part of Async_Operation_Hook values" )
esc_html( "Queue $queue is not a part of Async_Operation_Queue values" )
esc_html( "Unable to calculate file size for $path" )
esc_html( "Error while creating a backup for image $image_id and size $image_size" )
esc_html( "There is no entity with id '$image_id'" )

wp_kses_post( sprintf( __( 'If you enjoyed using Image Optimizer, consider leaving a ★★★★★ review to spread the word.', 'image-optimization' ), esc_url( self::NOTICE_FEEDBACK_LINK ), esc_attr__( 'Five stars', 'image-optimization' ) ) )

wp_kses_post( sprintf( __( 'If you\'ve enjoyed it, consider leaving a ★★★★★ review to spread the word.', 'image-optimization' ), esc_url( self::NOTICE_FEEDBACK_LINK ), esc_attr__( 'Five stars', 'image-optimization' ) ) )

wp_kses_post( sprintf( __( 'Found Image Optimizer helpful? Leave us a ★★★★★ rating!', 'image-optimization' ), esc_url( self::FOOTER_FEEDBACK_LINK ), esc_attr__( 'Five stars', 'image-optimization' ) ) )
esc_html( "Status $status is not a part of Bulk_Optimization_Queue_Status values" )
esc_html( "Status $status is not a part of Bulk_Optimization_Queue_Status values" )
esc_html( "Type $type is not a part of Bulk_Optimization_Queue_Type values" )
esc_html( "Error type $error_type is not a part of Image_Optimization_Error_Type values" )

$wpdb->prepare(
				"
				SELECT action_id
				FROM {$table_name}
				WHERE last_attempt_gmt IS NOT NULL
				  AND UNIX_TIMESTAMP(last_attempt_gmt) < %d
				",
				$threshold
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"
INSERT INTO $table_name ( $column_sql )
SELECT $placeholder_sql FROM DUAL
WHERE ( $where_clause ) IS NULL",
			$values
		)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"
SELECT action_id FROM $table_name
WHERE status IN ( $pending_status_placeholders )
AND hook = %s
AND `group_id` = %d
",
			array_merge(
				$pending_statuses,
				array(
					$data['hook'],
					$data['group_id'],
				)
			)
		)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT a.*, g.slug AS `group` FROM {$wpdb->actionscheduler_actions} a LEFT JOIN {$wpdb->actionscheduler_groups} g ON a.group_id=g.group_id WHERE a.action_id=%d",
				$action_id
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
					"UPDATE {$wpdb->actionscheduler_actions} SET status = %s WHERE action_id IN {$query_in}", // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.PreparedSQL.InterpolatedNotPrepared
					$parameters
				)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT action_id, scheduled_date_gmt FROM {$wpdb->actionscheduler_actions} WHERE claim_id = %d ORDER BY priority ASC, attempts ASC, scheduled_date_gmt ASC, action_id ASC",
			$claim_id
		)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT post_password) FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE post_password != '' AND post_type = %s AND post_status IN ('in-progress','pending')",
				array( self::POST_TYPE )
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT ID, post_date_gmt FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE post_type = %s AND post_password = %s",
				array(
					self::POST_TYPE,
					$claim_id,
				)
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"UPDATE {$wpdb->posts} SET post_password = '' WHERE ID = %d AND post_type = %s",
				$action_id,
				self::POST_TYPE
			)
$wpdb->prepare( "UPDATE {$wpdb->posts} SET post_status = %s WHERE ID = %d AND post_type = %s", self::STATUS_FAILED, $action_id, self::POST_TYPE )

$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT {$column_name} FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE ID=%d AND post_type=%s", // phpcs:ignore
				$action_id,
				self::POST_TYPE
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"UPDATE {$wpdb->posts} SET menu_order = menu_order+1, post_status=%s, post_modified_gmt = %s, post_modified = %s WHERE ID = %d AND post_type = %s",
				self::STATUS_RUNNING,
				current_time( 'mysql', true ),
				current_time( 'mysql' ),
				$action_id,
				self::POST_TYPE
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT ID FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE post_type = %s AND CHAR_LENGTH(post_content) > %d LIMIT 1",
					$maximum_args_length,
					self::POST_TYPE
				)

			],
		] )

				'code' => isset( $_GET['code'] ) ? sanitize_text_field( wp_unslash( $_GET['code'] ) ) : null,
			],
		] )
